button.name: approve
button.confirm: You will not be able to edit fields. Are you sure to want to approve the file?

button.name: generate_invoice
button.invisible: file_status != 'lock' or no_of_invoices > 0 or invoice_payment_type == 'osp' or type == 'investor'

button.name: generate_invoice
button.invisible: file_status != 'lock' or no_of_invoices > 0 or invoice_payment_type == 'tsp' or type == 'investor'

button.name: create_installment_plan
button.invisible: payment_type == 'lump_sum' or create_manually == True or installment_created == True or file_status in ('lock','approve')

field.name: create_manually
field.readonly: file_status != 'draft' or (token_generated == True or token_id != False)

field.name: plan_type
field.readonly: file_status != 'draft' or token_id != False or payment_type == 'lump_sum'

field.name: interval_id
field.readonly: file_status != 'draft' or token_id != False or payment_type == 'lump_sum'

field.name: starting_date
field.readonly: file_status != 'draft' or token_id != False or payment_type == 'lump_sum'

field.name: total_installment
field.readonly: file_status != 'draft' or token_id != False or payment_type == 'lump_sum'

label.invisible: payment_type == 'lump_sum' or plan_type == 'predefine' or create_manually != False

div.invisible: payment_type == 'lump_sum' or plan_type == 'predefine' or create_manually != False

field.name: initial_payment_percentage
field.invisible: initial_calculation_basis == 'fix' or create_manually == True or (payment_type == 'lump_sum' and type != 'investor')

label.invisible: payment_type == 'lump_sum' or plan_type == 'predefine' or create_manually != False

div.invisible: payment_type == 'lump_sum' or plan_type == 'predefine' or create_manually != False

field.name: balloting_amount_percentage
field.invisible: payment_type == 'lump_sum' or create_manually == True or balloting_calculation_basis == 'fix'

field.name: initial_payment
field.readonly: file_status != 'draft' or token_id != False or initial_calculation_basis == 'percentage'

field.name: balloting_amount
field.readonly: file_status != 'draft' or token_id != False or balloting_calculation_basis == 'percentage'
